name: Amersfoort (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the hoist band, the crosses' ground and the fess

description: A white field with a red band at the hoist bearing three white crosses, and a red horizontal band across the centre.
history: Flag of the municipality of Amersfoort in the province of Utrecht.

features.role: a red band at the hoist
three white crosses on the hoist band
a red band across the centre
